_comment: Tier-2 for skfem mixed_poisson#: pins the keyword-name set of skfem.condense and skfem.solve to the catalog's contract. condense must accept {A, b, x, I, D, expand}; solve must accept {A, b, x, I, solver}. Plus end-to-end smoke: get_dofs() returns DofsView (catalog claim), and condense(A, b, x=x, D=dofs) returns a >=3-tuple when x is supplied (catalog claim about extended return shape). Catalog generators rely on every one of these signature properties. Verified against skfem 12.0.1 on 2026-06-01.
